topic: Preference-Based Learning in Audio Applications: A Systematic Analysis
topic_definition: Preference-Based Learning in Audio Applications: A Systematic Analysis

summary_topics.description: Preference-Based Learning in Audio Applications: A Systematic Analysis

required.criterion: Matches the final search string: (“audio” OR “music” OR “acoustic”) AND (“preference learning” OR “RLHF” OR “DPO” OR “KTO”).

exclusion_criteria.criterion: Does not meet the predefined inclusion criteria for audio-based preference learning (as applied by the reviewers).
